name: sozio-thin
description: Reproducible analysis tools for 100 curated Swiss open-data resources.
long_description: Search, inspect, materialize, join, and analyze 100 curated Swiss open-data resources. Sozio Thin runs locally and lets Claude perform the reasoning and SQL generation. It does not contain an LLM and requires no API key, Python installation, Docker, Gemini, or Vespa.

tools.name: search_resources
tools.description: Search the local catalog of 100 curated Swiss open-data resources.

tools.name: get_resource_profile
tools.description: Return a complete resource profile and selected value details.

tools.name: get_context_bundle
tools.description: Build deterministic SQL-planning context without calling an LLM.

tools.name: materialize_resource
tools.description: Download a scoped PXWeb cube into the local Parquet cache.

tools.name: inspect_source
tools.description: Inspect a live source schema, sample rows, and selected distinct values.

tools.name: validate_sql
tools.description: Validate one read-only DuckDB query against an explicit source allowlist.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Validate and execute one read-only DuckDB query.

tools.name: format_reproduction_bundle
tools.description: Format the exact sources and SQL required to reproduce an answer.
